THIERRY HENRY AND LAUREN had to be separated as they rowed in the players’ tunnel after yesterday’s draw with Manchester United. Henry had furiously gesticulated at his team-mate and blamed Lauren for squandering the opportunity for a late winner. The Cameroon full back had tried to soothe tempers as they walked off the pitch, but Henry could not be mollified and had to be told to calm down as the contretemps continued.
